rulings.Case Title: HUONG (AMY) THAI-SILVA VS. MINH THAI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 1, 2018 line 1. CROSS COMPLAINANTs MINH THAI as individual, and MINH THAI as trustee's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication DENIED. Plaintiff's objection to paragraph 6 of Defendant's Declaration is sustained. Defendant failed to shift its burden. (See Fact 6). In the alternative, if objection is not sustained (if objection to Defendant's declaration paragraph 6 is overruled; the Court would overrule corresponding objections to Plaintiffs' Declarations paragraphs 8 and 9) there is a triable issue of fact as to the payments made towards the property. (See Fact 6). = (501/REQ)
